title: Dämon des Meeres
writer: Herman Melville, Ulrich Steindorff, J. Grubb Alexander
actors: William Dieterle, Lissy Arna, Anton Pointner
plot: Ahab pursues a whale that chewed off a leg when his brother, vying with him for the hand of a minister's daughter, pushed him overboard.When he has caught the monstrous whale he will then deal with his brother.
